CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 411245 Redfern vs. Sebastian, and Case No. 406014 Pacatte vs. Sebastian. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)
